blocks.input: {"command": "Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name", "description": "获取CPU型号信息"}
blocks.name: PowerShell

blocks.output: PowerShell executable not found (expected `pwsh` or `powershell` in PATH)

blocks.text: PowerShell不在PATH中，让我用其他方式获取CPU信息：

blocks.input: {"command": "wmic cpu get Name", "description": "通过WMIC获取CPU型号"}
blocks.name: bash

blocks.input: {"command": "powershell -Command \"Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name\"", "description": "通过cmd调用PowerShell获取CPU型号"}
blocks.name: bash

blocks.input: {"command": "cat /proc/cpuinfo 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not a Linux/WSL environment\"", "description": "尝试Linux方式获取CPU信息"}
blocks.name: bash

blocks.text:
抱歉，当前环境中无法执行命令来获取CPU型号。尝试的命令工具（`powershell`、`wmic`、`bash` 等）均未在 PATH 中找到或不可用。

**如果您需要获取CPU型号，可以手动运行以下命令：**

| 操作系统 | 命令 |
|---------|------|
| **Windows PowerShell** | `Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor \| Select-Object Name` |
| **Windows CMD** | `wmic cpu get Name` |
| **Linux** | `cat /proc/cpuinfo \| grep "model name"` 或 `lscpu \| grep "Model name"` |
| **macOS** | `sysctl -n machdep.cpu.brand_string` |

请问您是否希望我在其他方式上继续尝试，或者您可以直接告诉我您的CPU型号？
